spec: Contract carve-out: metering defect fix restoring VIOLATED standing goal ledger-completeness-live; must extend tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py in the same diff and stay <=200 changed lines. Steps: (1) Set frontmatter `status: in-progress` in /root/claude-brain/tasks/0025-fix-ledger-metering-local-inference.md before any code change. (2) Reproduce: read /root/noema-evolve/noema/budget/llm.py (BudgetedLLM) and one sample row from examples/circle_packing/noema_pes_output_v3/llm_calls.jsonl (READ ONLY — never write to any run dir) to see why usage parses to null against the local OpenAI-compatible server (likely streaming responses omit `usage`, or the parse reads the wrong key/shape). (3) Fix usage parsing in noema/budget/llm.py so prompt_tokens/completion_tokens/total_tokens are captured per attempt; if the server response genuinely lacks usage, compute a counted estimate and add `"estimated": true` to that ledger row — never write null totals. Touch only usage capture, not budget/accounting semantics. (4) Extend tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py with fixtures for (a) the local-server response shape that currently nulls out, asserting real token counts land in the ledger row, and (b) the missing-usage fallback, asserting estimated counts plus estimated:true. Do not modify or weaken existing tests. (5) Run `python3 -m unittest tests.test_noema_budgeted_llm` then `python3 -m unittest discover tests` from /root/noema-evolve; both must pass. (6) Fill the task file's 'Output / notes' section with root cause + fix summary; leave status/INDEX/done-move to the host loop. (7) Do NOT run any live LLM smoke test — done_when items 3–4 of the task (smoke run + standing-goal pass) are queue-tier and remain for the user; state this in Output / notes. No new dependencies; no changes outside noema/budget/llm.py, tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py, and the task file.
done_when: cd /root/noema-evolve && python3 -m unittest tests.test_noema_budgeted_llm passes with at least one new test exercising the local-server response shape (diff shows tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py extended, no existing assertions removed)
cd /root/noema-evolve && python3 -m unittest discover tests exits 0
git diff touches only noema/budget/llm.py, tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py, and the vault task file, with <=200 changed lines and no writes under examples/*output*, checkpoints/, or llm_calls.jsonl

grep shows frontmatter status: in-progress in /root/claude-brain/tasks/0025-fix-ledger-metering-local-inference.md and its 'Output / notes' section is non-empty, noting the smoke run is queued for the user
